name: Ask Concentration Contra in Low Volatility (h=50)
hypothesis: The parent spec showed a perfect win rate at h=20 in low-volatility regimes. This tests the persistence of that edge at a longer, 50-tick horizon to evaluate its decay curve and find the optimal holding period.
mutation_note: Based on feedback for parent spec 'iter012_ask_conc_low_vol' (100% WR), changing horizon from 20 to 50 ticks to test edge decay.
